excerpt: Every one of you who follows my command should follow the command of Ali after me.
source_location_hint: Opening discourse on Ghadir Khumm

excerpt: Did the Messenger of Allah not know better than the Ummah what disobeys Allah and what does not?
source_location_hint: Discussion of 5:67

excerpt: His guardianship is my guardianship; his command is my command; his covenant is my covenant. After me he shall be your guardian.
source_location_hint: Sermon at Ghadir Khumm

excerpt: Praise be to Allah that the truth has reached its original place! Here is the treasury of knowledge, here the very saliva of the Messenger of Allah.
source_work: Nahj al-Balagha (Sermon of ʿAlī at assuming Caliphate)
source_location_hint: First Khutba of ʿAlī as Caliph

excerpt: These five possess knowledge of all that Allah the Most High has created and brought into being from nothingness. They are the manifestations of Allah's power! They are the treasurers of the heavens and the earth.
source_location_hint: Dialogue of Imam Jaʿfar al-Sadiq with al-Mufaddal

excerpt: From the first He created Muhammad, and from the second Ali ibn Abi Talib. No other being was created from this light save these two. Allah fashioned them both with His might and breathed into them His Spirit.
source_location_hint: Section on Divine Luminous Beings

excerpt: Because of your guardianship with My saints and your enmity toward My enemies, I shall not be harsh with you in reckoning your account on account of your sins.
source_location_hint: Teaching on Self-Reckoning (muhasaba)

excerpt: Ali is a radiant and manifest Imam. He is the mighty banner of the Lord of the Universe and the great gate of Allah's mercy. Whosoever desires to reach Allah must enter through this gate!
source_location_hint: Discourse of Prophet with Abu Dharr al-Ghiffari

excerpt: When Ali complained to Allah about the distance of his separation, Allah created an angel in his form and placed him upon a throne of gold on the right side of the Throne, adorned with every precious gem.
source_location_hint: Angel created in form of Ali for celestial visitation

excerpt: One day a man came to me and said, 'O maidservant! Do you confess to the guardianship and love of Ali ibn Abi Talib?' I said, 'Yes!' He prayed, saying, 'O Allah! If what this maidservant says is true, restore her sight.' By the blessing of his prayer, my eyes opened.
source_location_hint: Story of the enslaved woman and Khumdar

excerpt: When Hazrat Abu Bakr was sent to Mecca to protect himself from the polytheists, Hazrat Gabriel came down and said, 'Your Lord has commanded that you yourself deliver it, or send someone from your kin.' The Messenger sent me after Abu Bakr to bring him back.
source_location_hint: Discussion of Ali's role and Abu Bakr's mission

excerpt: For you are the proof of Allah through whom He accepted Adam's repentance, saved Joseph from the well, and brought deliverance to Job.
source_location_hint: Salman's affirmation of Ali's cosmic role

excerpt: The Messenger of Allah said, On the Day of Resurrection, the pulpits of light will be established for all the prophets. Of all these pulpits, my pulpit will be the highest.
source_location_hint: al-Riyāḍ tradition

excerpt: O Fatima, thou art beloved to me, and O Ali, thou art mightier in my heart! O Fatima, thou art the Night of Power, and O Ali, thou art the Day of Ghadir.
source_location_hint: Merits of the Family of the Prophet

excerpt: Whatever trusts I have of the disbelievers and polytheists, you should return them. Despite this, we do not find any instance anywhere in history where someone came later and complained that Ali did not return their trust.
source_location_hint: On the relationship between the Prophet and Ali

excerpt: The Prophet put thousands of hadiths in his glory, virtues and manaqabat that Ali is the one who pays my debt, Ali is the one who distributes Paradise and Hell.
source_location_hint: On the merits narrated for Ali

excerpt: If you die in this state of love for the Ahl al-Bayt, when your soul reaches your throat, you will go to the Messenger of Allah with spirit and basil with the honorable angels welcoming you.
source_location_hint: The station of the Shi'a

excerpt: O Abraham, do not curse My servants. I am Ghafoor-ur-Rahim, a tyrant and a forbearer. The sins of My servants do not harm Me.
source_location_hint: On Allah's clemency and forbearance

excerpt: God has chosen faith for you and has adorned it in your hearts... And He loves those who have emigrated to Him... If you love God, then follow me, so that God will love you and you forgive sins.
source_location_hint: On faith, obedience, and divine love

excerpt: Thou shalt be with those whom thou lovest, and thou shalt be recompensed only for what thou didst do.
source_work: Ṣaḥīḥ al-Bukhāri and Sunni hadith corpus
source_location_hint: On companionship according to love

excerpt: We are the side of Allah and we are the Safwat Allah and we are the good of Allah and we are the repository of the inheritance of the prophets.
source_location_hint: On the station of the Ahl al-Bayt

excerpt: Whoever sees us and knows us and knows our right and takes our command is from us and to us. Whosoever has insight into Us, and knows Us and Our Truth, and obeys Our commandment, he is one of us.
source_location_hint: The duty of obedience to the Imams

excerpt: I am the wilayat of the Ahl Muhammad which you have been doing all my life. One of these six forms will introduce themselves: I am Prayer, I am Zakat, I am Fasting, I am Hajj and Umrah.
source_location_hint: On the forms in the grave and wilayat

excerpt: O Jabir, convey my greetings to my Shi'a and tell them that there is no relationship between us and God without obedience to Him. Whoever obeys God and loves us is our friend, and whoever disobeys God, our love will not benefit him.
source_location_hint: On love and obedience combined

excerpt: By Allah! Adam was not able to be created by God with His own hand and Spirit breathed into him except with the wilayat of Ali. God did not speak to Moses save through the wilayat of Ali. God did not establish Jesus as a sign save through submission to Ali.
source_location_hint: On wilayat as prerequisite to creation and prophecy

excerpt: We are Prayer in the Book of Allah and we are Zakat, and we are Fasting, and we are Hajj. We are the Sacred Sanctuary and we are the Kaaba of Allah, and we are the Qibla of Allah and we are the Face of Allah.
source_location_hint: On the Imams as manifestations of divine attributes

excerpt: And verily, thou art of a mighty character. This verse was revealed when he was 41 years old, that is, even though his prophethood has just begun.
source_location_hint: On the Prophet's pre-prophetic moral excellence

excerpt: The disbelievers would have converted to Islam after seeing his morals. For this reason, in the supplication of Hayat-e-Qaf, where the miracles of the prophets have been taken, the morals of the Prophet have been taken from them.
source_location_hint: On the Prophet's character as the greatest miracle

excerpt: Allah says in Surah Al-Balad: I certainly swear by the city of Mecca in which you live. Allah has honored your life because of your morals and has singled out your oath.
source_location_hint: On Allah's oath by the Prophet's presence

excerpt: If peace and tranquility are divided into ten parts, nine parts of it will be silence and one part will take conversation. He used to be very silent and prayed that Allah would make my silence a lesson.
source_location_hint: On the virtue of the Prophet's taciturnity

excerpt: When the angels saw our unparalleled light, they counted us great. We glorify the Almighty so that the angels may know that we are His creation, and that He is glorified of our attributes.
source_location_hint: On the Prophet and Imams as teachers of the angels

excerpt: When the angels saw the blessing given to us by Allah and our obedience which is obligatory on the people, we said 'Praise be to Allah' so that the angels may know that praise and praise is due only to Allah.
source_location_hint: On how the Ahl al-Bayt teach the angels

excerpt: Allah placed us in Adam's loin as a trust, and commanded the angels to prostrate before Adam in reverence of us. How could we not have been superior to the angels when all the angels prostrated themselves before Adam?
source_authority: Ismaili doctrine of Ahl al-Bayt superiority
source_location_hint: On the reason for angelic prostration to Adam
